news.t: CLUB MED ADVANCES STRATEGIC NORTH AMERICAN EXPANSION WITH THE REDEVELOPMENT OF CARAMBOLA BEACH RESORT IN ST. CROIX IN PARTNERSHIP WITH VICI PROPERTIES
Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Billionaires Club ETF (CLUB) with Bancreek Capital Strategies

holdings.infoBox: CLUB is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Space Exploration Technologies stock at 3.91%, LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne at 3.79%, Interactive Brokers Group at 3.67%, Blackstone at 3.67%, and HCA Healthcare at 3.66%.

overview.description: The Billionaires Club ETF (CLUB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects stocks of companies founded, owned, or developed by billionaires, or stakeholders with net worths exceeding $1 billion. CLUB was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Billionaires.
